title: mesosphaerum incisum
intro: Mesosphaerum incisum, also known as Lemon Beebalm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as nausea, indigestion, and diarrhea, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's leaves and flowers have been reported to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and acting as an antiseptic. Mesosphaerum incisum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
